overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny suburban hillside neighborhood with palm trees and modern houses. The character navigates a curved road, stops at an intersection to let vehicles pass, then crosses while looking around the residential area.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved residential hillside street with white barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily uphill along the curved asphalt road bordered by white concrete barriers and palm trees

entered.detail: low white concrete barrier running along the left side of the curved road
tall palm trees lining the street and hillside
modern blue two-story house with dark roof visible ahead on the road
steep hillside with grass, rocks, and scattered trees
black trash bins positioned near the white barrier

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit curved residential street lined with white concrete barriers and palm trees. A blue two-story house sits ahead on the hillside, with a steep vegetated slope rising to the right. The environment is quiet with no visible traffic or pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching residential intersection with stop sign

events.description: gray convertible sports car drives past from behind and continues up the road
character stops at the intersection edge to wait for crossing traffic

agents.ego_description: continuing along the road then halting at the intersection as vehicles approach from the side

notable_agents.action: gray convertible driving uphill past the character on the right side

entered.detail: detached garage with brown doors adjacent to the blue house
red octagonal stop sign at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: A gray convertible passes by as the character approaches a residential intersection. The character stops at the corner near a stop sign, with the blue house now closer on the right. The white barriers fall behind as the road opens into the intersection.

events.description: white SUV drives through the intersection from left to right
red sedan drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: standing at the corner waiting for vehicles to clear the intersection before crossing

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving across the intersection from left to right
red sedan driving across the intersection from right to left

segments.scene_description: The character waits at the intersection as a white SUV and then a red sedan drive through. The blue house sits prominently on the right side of the frame while the character observes the traffic from the corner.

events.description: character crosses the street and begins looking around the neighborhood

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and rotating to observe the surrounding houses and palm trees on the hillside

entered.detail: contemporary multi-level house with large windows built into the hillside
wooden utility pole with overhead power lines crossing the street

segments.scene_description: After the traffic clears, the character crosses the street and surveys the neighborhood. Modern houses built into the hillside become visible on the right, while the blue house shifts to the left as the character turns. Utility poles and power lines frame the view of the winding residential streets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit suburban hillside that transitions from a quiet residential stretch to a busy intersection and finally into a wider view of the neighborhood. It begins with the character walking along a curved street lined with palm trees and white concrete barriers, moving toward a blue two-story house perched on a vegetated slope. As the character approaches a residential intersection, a gray convertible passes by and the white barriers recede, leading the camera to a stop at a corner sign. The scene then lingers as a white SUV and a red sedan drive through the intersection while the blue house remains prominent on the right. Finally, the character crosses the street and turns, shifting the blue house to the left to reveal a series of modern hillside homes framed by utility poles and winding roads.
